initiatives.name: Utah Valley Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: Utah Valley Mutual Aid is a mutual aid network for the whole Utah Valley. We seek to empower each other individually and communally through direct action and mutual aid. This might be groceries, medical supplies, prescriptions or other necessities that are hard to acquire in times of panic.

initiatives.name: Unsheltered Utah
initiatives.description: Unsheltered Utah is a non-profit organization focused on meeting the immediate needs of the unsheltered residents of Utah, coordinating with existing social services, while working toward creating employment and permanent housing solutions.
